title: Is BuyAndScrap.com Free to Use? Yes! Sell Your Car & Find Your Next One for Free
metaDescription: Wondering 'is BuyAndScrap.com free to use'? Yes! Easily list your car or find your next honest motor without paying a penny. Free, fair & transparent for UK buyers and sellers.
content:
## Is BuyAndScrap.com Free to Use? Yes! Sell Your Car & Find Your Next One for Free

**Is BuyAndScrap.com free to use?** Yes, absolutely, for its main services. You can list your car for sale and browse thousands of honest vehicles across the UK without paying any fees. Our mission is to connect car buyers and sellers directly, making car trading simple and genuinely affordable for everyone.

### How BuyAndScrap.com Works: Free for UK Buyers and Sellers

We believe in making car ownership accessible. That's why we've built a platform that removes unnecessary costs. Here’s how our free approach benefits you, whether you’re selling your current motor or searching for a new one.

#### For Car Sellers: Listing Your Vehicle is Free

Thinking of selling your car in the UK? We make it easy and, more importantly, free. You can create a standard advert for your vehicle at no cost.

Upload multiple photos, write a detailed description, set your price, and list all the important specifications. You won't face any charges for a basic listing. Our goal is to help you sell your car efficiently and without hassle. Get started today on our [Sell Your Car](/sell) page.

While standard listings are free, we do offer optional upgrades. These might include 'featured' listings or premium promotion packages. They can give your advert an extra boost, but they are never mandatory. Many sellers find success with a free listing alone.

#### For Car Buyers: Find Your Next Car for Free

If you're on the hunt for your next set of wheels, you’ll be pleased to hear our service is 100% free for you too. Browsing our thousands of listings costs nothing at all.

You can filter by make, model, price, location, and more, all without any subscription fees or hidden costs. Found a car you like? Contacting the seller directly through our platform is also completely free. Start your search now and [Browse Cars](/cars).

### Why Choose BuyAndScrap.com? Our Commitment to Honest UK Car Trading

We understand the importance of trust and transparency when buying or selling a car. That’s why we focus on connecting you directly with other honest individuals. Our platform is built on fairness and simplicity, not hidden fees.

We also provide helpful resources to guide you. Check out our [Guides](/guides) for expert advice, or use our [Free MOT Checker](/mot-checker) to verify a car's history. We’re here to support you every step of the way.

### Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) About BuyAndScrap.com

**Q: So, really, is BuyAndScrap.com free to use?**

A: Yes, absolutely. Creating a standard car advert and browsing thousands of listings are both 100% free. You can also contact sellers directly without charge.

**Q: What if I want my car to sell faster?**

A: We offer optional premium upgrades for sellers. These can boost your ad's visibility, but they're never mandatory. Many sellers achieve quick sales with just a free listing.

**Q: Are there any hidden fees for buyers?**

A: None at all. As a buyer, you can search for cars, filter results, and contact sellers completely free of charge. Your only cost is the car itself!

---

Ready to find your next honest car? [Start Browsing Cars Now](/cars) and discover affordable vehicles across the UK.
